channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matt Canavan becomes National Party leader as Iranian women are granted asylum in Australia
item.description: During a lively session of federal question time, multiple political developments captured national attention. Matt Canavan has been elected leader of the National Party, signalling a shift for the pa...

item.title: Kenya Expands Irrigation Projects to Strengthen Food Security and Farmer Productivity
item.description: Kenya is pushing hard to increase its irrigated land, with plans to cover over one million acres. Currently, the country has around 763,000 acres under irrigation, but the National Irrigation Sector I...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Edge Out Toronto Maple Leafs 3-1 in Hard-Fought Game
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens secured a 3-1 win over the Toronto Maple Leafs, showcasing a remarkable performance across all three scoring lines. After a shaky start in the first period, the Canadiens quickl...

item.title: VP Sara reminds Filipinos to uphold justice and sovereignty on Rodrigo Duterte arrest anniversary
item.description: On the first anniversary of former President Rodrigo Duterte's arrest and transfer to The Hague, Vice President Sara Duterte urged the Filipino people to remain vigilant against any attempts to manipu...

item.title: Women’s Coalition Calls for Independent Investigation into Serious Claims in Mbulu
item.description: A coalition of women-led organisations in Tanzania has called for an independent investigation into serious claims raised by a woman, Ms Teresia Teofili, during a public meeting in Mbulu District, Man...

item.title: Iran Declares Continuation of Blockade in Hormuz Strait Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Iran has vowed to continue blocking the strategic Strait of Hormuz as long as its conflict with the United States and Israel persists. Despite US President Donald Trump signalling possible talks with ...

item.title: Imran Khan’s family members prevented from meeting him outside Adiala jail, PTI criticises government
item.description: On Tuesday, sisters of former Prime Minister Imran Khan were stopped at a check post outside Adiala jail, leading them to stage a sit-in. Some Pakistan Tehreek-i-Insaf (PTI) workers who tried to appro...

item.title: US Envoy Witkoff Says Russia Denied Sharing Military Intel with Iran in Call with Trump, as Meeks Comments on Contrary Reports
item.description: In a CNN interview, Democratic Congressman Gregory Meeks addressed reports indicating that Russia has been providing Iran with intelligence on the locations and movements of U.S. military assets amid ...

item.title: Muturi Details Ruto's Choice of Gachagua as Running Mate in 2022 Elections
item.description: Justin Muturi, leader of the Democratic Party, has revealed why President William Ruto chose Rigathi Gachagua as his running mate in the 2022 elections instead of him. Muturi explained that the night ...

item.title: Early-stage cancer blood tests show promise but remain unproven for general screening
item.description: Recent advances in blood tests that detect fragments of cancer DNA have sparked hope for earlier diagnosis of multiple cancers with a simple blood sample. These tests, under trial in the UK, aim to id...

item.title: Kenya Pipeline Company enters new phase amid sector reforms and expansion plans
item.description: The article talks about how Kenya Pipeline Company (KPC) is entering a fresh phase in the country’s energy sector, marked by planned expansions, regulatory changes and debates over privatisation of st...

item.title: US Strikes Iranian Mine-Laying Vessels Amid Tensions in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On March 10, 2026, the US military reportedly destroyed 16 Iranian mine-laying vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway through which a significant portion of the world's oil and liquefied ...

item.title: Africa Energy Indaba 2026 highlights progress in energy investment, regional cooperation and infrastructure
item.description: The 18th Africa Energy Indaba, held from 3–5 March 2026 at the Cape Town International Convention Centre, successfully brought together policymakers, investors, utilities and industry leaders from acr...

item.title: Marcos says Independent Commission for Infrastructure has completed its work on flood control probe
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. stated that the Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) has already carried out its assigned responsibilities in investigating alleged irregularities ...

item.title: Two Non-Tribal Residents Killed in West Garo Hills During Tribal Council Election Clashes
item.description: In Meghalaya's West Garo Hills district, two non-tribal residents lost their lives on Tuesday following suspected police firing during clashes linked to the Garo Hills Autonomous District Council elec...

item.title: Somali immigrants take legal action against US government over TPS termination
item.description: Somali immigrants living in the United States are fighting back against the Trump administration’s plan to end their Temporary Protected Status (TPS), which allows them to live and work legally. About...

item.title: UK Grassroots Activism Drives Significant Reduction in Public Fossil Fuel Funding
item.description: In 2021, multiple governments agreed to stop using public funds for overseas fossil fuel projects, forming what is now known as the Clean Energy Transition Partnership (CETP). This initiative led to a...

item.title: NACC finds serious misconduct by public servants in robodebt case but clears Scott Morrison
item.description: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) has released its long-awaited report into the robodebt scheme, two-and-a-half years after its establishment. The report examined six individuals referred...

item.title: Wayne Rooney supports Coleen at her Primark launch after recent partying incident
item.description: Wayne Rooney, 40, appears to have mended fences with his wife Coleen after a recent night out in Manchester where he was seen with two unidentified women at a pre-Brit Awards event. Despite some embar...

item.title: Rising Trends in Online Child Sexual Exploitation Across Canada
item.description: Police services across Canada reported 16,905 incidents of online child sexual exploitation (OCSE) in 2024, marking a 16 per cent decline from the previous year. Despite this recent decrease, long-ter...
